summary: Iteration 20: Tested multilingual UI support (PL/EN/DE/CS). All language switchers work correctly on all pages. Fixed Hero.jsx fallback logic bug where DE/CS translations weren't showing. Nav labels, CTA buttons, contact form, and footer all translate correctly.

issues: Feature badges ('Polska produkcja', 'Gotowe w 5-10 dni', 'Gwarancja 24 miesiące') are hardcoded in Polish and don't translate - minor issue

action_items: Consider adding translations for Hero feature badges (currently hardcoded in Polish)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multilingual feature fully working. Language switcher implementations: 1) MainLanding (/) uses dropdown LanguageSwitcher with data-testid='lang-switcher-btn' and 'lang-option-{code}'. 2) /sauny uses inline PL|EN|DE|CS bar with data-testid='lang-btn-{code}' (desktop) and 'mobile-lang-btn-{code}' (mobile menu). 3) /balie, /blog, /b2b use GlobalHeader with dropdown LanguageSwitcher. Language stored in localStorage key 'wm-sauna-lang'. Default is 'pl'. All nav labels, hero text, CTA buttons, contact form, and footer translate correctly for all 4 languages.

language_switcher_main_landing.details: Dropdown with PL/EN/DE/CS options, data-testid='lang-switcher-btn' and 'lang-option-{code}'

language_switcher_sauny.details: Inline PL|EN|DE|CS bar with data-testid='lang-btn-{code}', mobile menu has 'mobile-lang-btn-{code}'

nav_labels_translation.details: All nav labels translate correctly: Models/Modelle/Modely, Calculator/Kalkulator/Kalkulačka, Projects/Projekte/Realizace, In Stock/Sofort verfügbar/Ihned k dodání, Reviews/Bewertungen/Recenze, About Us/Über uns/O nás, Contact/Kontakt/Kontakt

hero_title_translation.details: Hero title translates for all languages after fix. PL: 'Producent Saun Drewnianych w Polsce', EN: 'Wooden Sauna Manufacturer in Poland', DE: 'Holzsauna-Hersteller in Polen', CS: 'Výrobce dřevěných saun v Polsku'

hero_cta_translation.details: CTA buttons translate correctly: Oblicz cenę/Calculate Price/Preis berechnen/Spočítat cenu, Zobacz ofertę/View Offer/Angebot ansehen/Zobrazit nabídku

footer_translation.details: Footer translates correctly: Szybkie linki/Quick Links/Schnelllinks

language_persistence.details: Language selection persists in localStorage key 'wm-sauna-lang' across page navigation

default_language.details: Default language is PL (Polish) when no localStorage value set

bug_fixed.issue: Hero title/subtitle not translating for DE/CS languages
bug_fixed.root_cause: Fallback logic prioritized heroSettings.title_pl over t('hero.title') translation
bug_fixed.fix: Changed fallback from 'heroSettings[key] || heroSettings.title_pl || t('hero.title')' to 'heroSettings[key] || t('hero.title')'
